## Checklist

- [ ] `make verify` passes locally
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for this change
- [ ] Documentation was updated where relevant
- [ ] No canon entity, status, event, or reason code was renamed or removed without an accepted ADR
- [ ] No secrets or real personal data were added
